text: Here is my passport and boarding pass.

key: Can I take this luggage on board?
text: Can I take this luggage on board?

key: Could I have an aisle seat, please?
text: Could I have an aisle seat, please?

key: I must be at the gate before departure.
text: I must be at the gate before departure.

key: Is there any delay with the flight?
text: Is there any delay with the flight?

key: You have to go through security.
text: You have to go through security.
Good morning. Here is my passport and boarding pass. I have one bag to check in. Could I have an aisle seat, please? I must go through security and customs. I will board at gate twenty-two.

Good afternoon, passengers. The flight to New York will board soon at gate twenty-two. Departure is at three forty. Please have your passport and boarding pass ready. You must go through security before boarding. There is no delay today.

I travel to the United States once a year. At the airport, I always check in early. I have one bag for check-in and one small bag with me. I prefer an aisle seat. I must be at the gate thirty minutes before departure.
